steps.title: Identify the need for plural possessives
steps.content: The passage contrasts two samples (sample 15 and sample 18), each with distinct odors and primary descriptors—requiring plural forms for both samples and odors.

steps.title: Apply the plural possessive rule
steps.content: Plural nouns ending in s form the possessive with only the apostrophe, not 's. Option D uses samples' odors' correctly to mark both as plural possessives. Options A, B, and C fail to do so—either using singular forms or omitting possession markers. That matches choice D — D is correct.
